title: Loan Manager
description: Loan Manager is a financial application that allows users to track and manage their loans. With this tool, users can get the latest exchange rates, set reminders for their payday, and view statistics about their financial situation. The app helps users stay organized and on top of their loan payments, ensuring they don't miss any deadlines and avoid late fees. It also provides valuable insights into their overall financial health, allowing them to make informed decisions about their money.

functionality: Track your unpaid and paid loans
Keep a history of your loans

links.title: Google Play
links.description: Available to download from the Google Play Store for Android devices.

links.title: Video Preview
links.description: Take a sneak peak into what the application looks like on YouTube

functionality: Convert your loans into multiple currencies
Get latest exchange rates for everyday
Add different types of loans like subscription or reminder
Get monthly, quaterly, or yearly statistics

title: Lay Ao
description: Lay Ao is a digital grocery store application that allows users to create their own store on the platform. Other users can then browse and order groceries from these stores, as well as store their favorites for easy reordering. Lay Ao also offers a delivery service, allowing users to schedule a time for their groceries to be brought to them. Additionally, the app has a "ready-to-pick" feature, which allows users to add items to their cart and pay for them in advance, skipping the line at the store. Users can also create a Wishlist of desired items for future reference.

functionality: Purchase grocery from a variety of products
Place order or schedule an order

title: Little Lemon (iOS)
description: Little Lemon iOS version of the application is developed using SwiftUI and I will keep on updating it. Currently, there is no published version of it but soon I will be making it available on TestFlight for a demo. The application allows going through a resturant's menu and ordering it.
